parties.name: MANNS, LISA L. 2191 FLEETWOOD DRIVE SAN BRUNO, CA 94066

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Manns in Propria Persona.

Ms. Manns stated that she filed this petition because the Italian Government requires this for formal recognition of citizenship, that her Father was an inherent citizen of Italy because of his Parents and there has been a direct line of inheritance between her Father and his Father. Ms. Mann also stated that she can't speak as to the change in the social security number, that her Father actually got a social security number, that she does not know why the wrong number was put on the death certificate, that she believes it was a clerical error and that she is not seeking to amend the death certificate. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
